case_title: EVEREST NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. COLLIER'S INTERNATIONAL, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-14-2012 CONTINUED TO SEP-18-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FEB-26-2013 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. ********************* VACATED PER 3/25/13 ORDER *********************
